title: Virginia Advances in ACC Tourney with Win Over NC State
summary: No. 10 Virginia defeats NC State 81-74 for the third time this season in the ACC Tournament. Malik Thomas scored 16 points.
charlotte_impact: Virginia's continued success in the ACC Tournament boosts team morale and fan engagement.

title: Virginia Secures Victory Against NC State, 81-74
summary: Malik Thomas and Thijs De Ridder lead No. 10 Virginia to an 81-74 victory over NC State in the ACC Tournament.
charlotte_impact: The win advances Virginia in the tournament, increasing their chances for a championship run.

title: Virginia and NC State Face Off in ACC Tournament Quarterfinals
summary: Virginia plays NC State in the quarterfinal round of the 2026 ACC Tournament in Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: This game is crucial for both teams' chances of advancing in the ACC Tournament.

title: NC State vs. Virginia: ACC Tournament Odds and Predictions
summary: Preview of the ACC Tournament quarterfinal game between NC State and No. 11 Virginia in Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Provides insights and predictions for fans and bettors interested in the game.

title: Spring Weather: Warming Trend Expected This Weekend
summary: Highs will steadily increase this weekend, with Friday feeling like April, Saturday like May, and Sunday like June!
charlotte_impact: Residents can plan outdoor activities and enjoy the pleasant spring weather.

title: Former USPS Employee Sentenced for Mail Theft and Bank Fraud
summary: Andre Whitehurst sentenced to 15 months for bank fraud involving stolen mail, with attempted losses of $364,000.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the consequences of mail theft and bank fraud, deterring similar crimes.

title: Catawba County Considers School District Merger
summary: Catawba County is considering merging local schools into one school district, to be called the Catawba Valley School District.
charlotte_impact: The merger could impact school resources, student assignments, and educational quality.

title: Shooting Near Walmart in Charlotte's University City Injures One
summary: One person was hurt in a shooting outside the Walmart on North Tryon Street near Pavilion Boulevard.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about public safety and the potential for violence in public spaces.

title: Salisbury Shooting Leaves One Dead, Two Injured
summary: A domestic assault escalated into a shooting in Salisbury, resulting in one fatality and two injuries.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the dangers of domestic violence and the potential for deadly outcomes.

title: Authorities Seek to Identify Skeletal Remains Found in Lancaster County
summary: Lancaster authorities released a composite image to identify skeletal remains found in 2024, seeking public assistance.
charlotte_impact: Aids in solving a cold case and providing closure to the deceased's family.

title: Overnight Stabbing in Uptown Seriously Injures One
summary: A 23-year-old is hospitalized after a stabbing in Uptown early Friday on W 6th Street.
charlotte_impact: Increases awareness of violent crime in the Uptown area and the need for safety measures.

title: Monroe Police Arrest Juvenile in Bedroom Break-In
summary: Monroe Police detained a juvenile suspect in a break-in where a woman awoke to find someone trying to remove her clothing.
charlotte_impact: Addresses concerns about home security and the vulnerability of residents to intrusion.

title: Man Charged with Child Sex Offenses After Victim Discloses Abuse
summary: John Walter Breedlove is charged with kidnapping, taking indecent liberties with a child, and first-degree forcible sex offense.
charlotte_impact: Emphasizes the importance of protecting children and holding perpetrators of abuse accountable.

title: Man Faces 11 Counts of Sexual Abuse Against a Minor in Chesterfield County
summary: A man in Chesterfield County faces 11 felony charges for alleged child sexual abuse, with an ongoing investigation.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the severity of child sexual abuse and the commitment to prosecuting offenders.

title: NCDMV Launches Online Tool for Real-Time Wait Times
summary: North Carolina's new real-time wait time tool helps you pick the best time and location to visit the DMV.
charlotte_impact: Improves customer service and reduces inconvenience for individuals visiting DMV offices.
